productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Tops
description: Composition Black tube top made of 92% polyamide and 8% elastane, with ribbing on the top and bottom Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Get stylish, get feminine with this black tube top from united colors of benetton. The polyamide-elastane fabric sits snug on your torso, offering a fresh and comfortable feel. Team this with denim pants or short skirts and stilletos for that chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tube tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
